location.label: Location
location.description: Location for the display of date/time.

center_location.label: Center On Location
center_location.description: Whether to center the map on the location.

time_format.label: Time Format
time_format.description: The format used for the time.

blink_time.label: Blinking Time Separator
blink_time.description: Whether to blink the colon between hours and minutes.

show_date.label: Date Overlay
show_date.description: Whether the date overlay should be shown.
